'''鈭歞-v-v''' ('''kadavav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:earth|earth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:earth|earth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-v-v
|-
! Lemma
| kadavav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidavav|thidavav]] || [[word:jidavav|jidavav]] || [[word:shidavav|shidavav]] || [[word:kidavav|kidavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudavav|thuthudavav]] || [[word:jujudavav|jujudavav]] || [[word:shushudavav|shushudavav]] || [[word:kukudavav|kukudavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudavav|thudavav]] || [[word:judavav|judavav]] || [[word:shudavav|shudavav]] || [[word:kudavav|kudavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudavav|thudavav]] || [[word:judavav|judavav]] || [[word:shudavav|shudavav]] || [[word:kudavav|kudavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedavav|thedavav]] || [[word:jedavav|jedavav]] || [[word:shedavav|shedavav]] || [[word:kedavav|kedavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodavav|thothodavav]] || [[word:jojodavav|jojodavav]] || [[word:shoshodavav|shoshodavav]] || [[word:kokodavav|kokodavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodavav|thodavav]] || [[word:jodavav|jodavav]] || [[word:shodavav|shodavav]] || [[word:kodavav|kodavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodavav|thodavav]] || [[word:jodavav|jodavav]] || [[word:shodavav|shodavav]] || [[word:kodavav|kodavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙davav|th忙davav]] || [[word:j忙davav|j忙davav]] || [[word:sh忙davav|sh忙davav]] || [[word:k忙davav|k忙davav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadavav|thathadavav]] || [[word:jajadavav|jajadavav]] || [[word:shashadavav|shashadavav]] || [[word:kakadavav|kakadavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadavav|thadavav]] || [[word:jadavav|jadavav]] || [[word:shadavav|shadavav]] || [[word:kadavav|kadavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadavav|thadavav]] || [[word:jadavav|jadavav]] || [[word:shadavav|shadavav]] || [[word:kadavav|kadavav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadavav|shadavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadavav|goshadavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadavav|gokishadavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadavavn眉|shadavavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadavavnkn眉|goshadavavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavavn眉|gokishadavavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadavavsh毛|shadavavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadavavnksh毛|goshadavavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadavavsh毛|gokishadavavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavavro|shadavavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavavnkro|goshadavavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavavro|gokishadavavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavavmu|shadavavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavavnkmu|goshadavavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavavmu|gokishadavavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadavavsher|shadavavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadavavnksher|goshadavavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadavavsher|gokishadavavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadavavng|shadavavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadavavnkng|goshadavavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadavavng|gokishadavavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadavavya|shadavavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadavavnkya|goshadavavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadavavya|gokishadavavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadavavyam|shadavavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadavavnkyam|goshadavavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadavavyam|gokishadavavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavavn眉sh毛|shadavavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavavnkn眉sh毛|goshadavavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavavn眉sh毛|gokishadavavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavavn眉ro|shadavavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavavnkn眉ro|goshadavavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavavn眉ro|gokishadavavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavavn眉mu|shadavavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavavnkn眉mu|goshadavavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavavn眉mu|gokishadavavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavavsh毛n眉|shadavavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavavnksh毛n眉|goshadavavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavavsh毛n眉|gokishadavavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavavsh毛ro|shadavavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavavnksh毛ro|goshadavavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavavsh毛ro|gokishadavavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavavsh毛mu|shadavavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavavnksh毛mu|goshadavavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavavsh毛mu|gokishadavavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavavron眉|shadavavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavavnkron眉|goshadavavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavavron眉|gokishadavavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavavrosh毛|shadavavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavavnkrosh毛|goshadavavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavavrosh毛|gokishadavavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavavromu|shadavavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavavnkromu|goshadavavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavavromu|gokishadavavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavavmun眉|shadavavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavavnkmun眉|goshadavavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavavmun眉|gokishadavavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavavmush毛|shadavavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavavnkmush毛|goshadavavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavavmush毛|gokishadavavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavavmuro|shadavavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavavnkmuro|goshadavavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavavmuro|gokishadavavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
